'''Walk worms''' were large centipede-like, insectile creatures that guarded [[Uda-Khalid]]'s hidden fortress.

They were four meters long and had segmented bodies. Large mandibles protruded from their mouths, used to capture and kill their prey.

{{Creature-stub}}
